title: T-039 — shift_handovers + shift_assignments tables + Server Actions for crew/handover
prompt:
# T-039 — Shifts: handovers + assignments + Server Actions

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §8.1 SCR-08-08, V-PROD-SHIFT-001/002

## Goal
Create shift_handovers and shift_assignments tables (referenced in §8.1 SCR-08-08), plus Server Actions assignCrew and saveHandover with V-PROD-SHIFT-001 line_certifications guard.

## Implementation contract
Migration: shift_assignments(id UUID PK, tenant_id, shift_id, line_id, operator_id, started_at, status enum 'active'|'on_break'|'left', UNIQUE(shift_id, line_id, operator_id)); shift_handovers(id UUID PK, tenant_id, shift_id, line_id, author_user_id, note text CHECK length<=500, created_at). Server Actions in apps/web/app/(production)/shifts/actions.ts: assignCrew({shift_id, line_id, operator_id}) verifies users.line_certifications contains line_id (V-PROD-SHIFT-001 → 422 if missing) then upserts shift_assignments; saveHandover({shift_id, line_id, note}) inserts shift_handovers row.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_shift_handovers_assignments.sql [create]
- packages/db/schema/production/shifts.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(production)/shifts/actions.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(production)/shifts/__tests__/actions.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given operator with line_certifications containing 'LINE-01', when assignCrew({shift_id,'LINE-01',operator_id}), then row inserted into shift_assignments
2. Given operator without 'LINE-01' in line_certifications, when assignCrew, then 422 ValidationError code='operator_not_certified_for_line' (V-PROD-SHIFT-001)
3. Given saveHandover with note length 600, when called, then 422 listing note CHECK length<=500

## Test strategy
- RED: action test asserting certification guard + length CHECK + happy path before actions exist
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test shifts.*actions'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip line_certifications check (V-PROD-SHIFT-001)
- Do not allow note >500 chars
- Do not modify users table

pipeline_inputs.description: Schema + Server Actions for shift_assignments and shift_handovers with V-PROD-SHIFT-001 guard.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration creates two tables; Server Actions in shifts/actions.ts: assignCrew (cert-guarded), saveHandover (length-checked). RLS on both tables.
out_of_scope: Do not implement shift end sign-off (T-040)
acceptance_criteria: Given operator certified for LINE-01, when assignCrew, then shift_assignments row inserted
Given operator not certified, when assignCrew, then 422 operator_not_certified_for_line
Given saveHandover with note length 600, when called, then 422 listing note length
test_strategy: RED: action test asserting cert guard + length CHECK + happy path before actions exist
